title: Validate cookie flow against live MLX API
description: Run live integration/end-to-end validation for the cookie flow against the real Multilogin X APIs using the configured MLX_TOKEN, capture any request/response mismatches, and fix the SDK accordingly.
close_reason: Live MLX validation completed; profile lifecycle, transfer/import-export, and cookie seeding flows now pass reliably against the real API.

title: Add cookie seeding E2E coverage
description: Add gated end-to-end coverage for pre-made cookie website discovery, cookie metadata creation/update, cookie seeding helper execution, and launcher cookie export validation against the real Multilogin X APIs.

title: Add cookie seeding helper
description: Implement a high-level helper that creates or updates pre-made cookie metadata, fetches generated cookie bundles, resolves the profile folder when needed, and imports cookies into the profile with typed results and tests.

title: Add cookies service to SDK
description: Implement first-class cookie operations in the Go SDK, including pre-made cookies target website listing, cookies metadata create/update, cookies list retrieval, and launcher cookie import/export support with typed models and tests.

title: Bootstrap local git repository
description: Initialize the local repository baseline by reviewing ignore rules, staging the intended project files, verifying tests pass, and creating the first local commit without configuring any remote.

title: Research pre-made cookies endpoints
description: Inspect the Multilogin X Postman collection for pre-made cookies, cookie import/export, and cookie metadata endpoints that can be used to seed believable browsing history for profiles, then summarize what the SDK is missing.

title: Add filesystem export manager layer
description: Implement a filesystem-oriented export manager layer that organizes exported profile archives into per-profile folders without ever renaming the zip file itself, plus unit tests and documentation for safe archive handling.

title: Add import-export E2E coverage
description: Add gated end-to-end coverage for profile export and import flows, verify export path semantics from the real MultiloginX API, and document important operational constraints around profile quota and permanent deletion versus trash.

title: Extend MultiloginX CRUD E2E flow
description: Expand the gated end-to-end profile lifecycle test to cover profile search, update, partial update, soft delete, restore, launcher start/status/stop, and final cleanup against the real MultiloginX API.

title: Add MultiloginX E2E vertical
description: Add a gated end-to-end test flow for folders, profiles, and launcher operations using MLX_TOKEN and explicit environment flags, starting with create/start/status/stop/delete behavior.

title: Strengthen MultiloginX typed models
description: Replace generic profile parameter maps with stronger typed request and response models for flags, storage, fingerprint, proxy, and related profile lifecycle payloads in the Go SDK.

title: Scaffold MultiloginX Go SDK architecture
description: Create the initial Go SDK layout inspired by strong patterns from go-github and godo, with service-oriented design, TDD workflow, and room for unit, integration, and E2E tests against the real API.

title: Select MultiloginX SDK MVP endpoints
description: Review the extracted MultiloginX Postman endpoint inventory and decide which profile, launcher, import/export, and folder endpoints belong in the first SDK version while excluding billing, account, and unrelated APIs.

title: Scaffold MultiloginX Go SDK architecture
description: Create the initial Go SDK layout inspired by strong patterns from go-github and godo, with service-oriented design, TDD workflow, and room for unit, integration, and E2E tests against the real API.

title: Research MultiloginX API surface
description: Investigate the Postman collection safely without dumping the full JSON, look for skills/workflows for large JSON handling, and identify profile-related endpoints that belong in the Go SDK while excluding billing/account management endpoints.

title: Add roadmap issues for next SDK milestones
description: Track the next planned SDK milestones after the current MVP: profile lookup helper, broader typed model coverage, retry/backoff for launcher and transfer polling, high-level workflows, Rod examples, batch helpers, and archive edge-case tests.
